subtasks.description: Fetch Datadog license allocation data (licensed seats, tiers, categories) and actual consumption metrics (active users, organizations, service metrics) from the primary data warehouse
Calculate Datadog usage growth trends over time, including month-over-month and year-over-year growth rates, utilization rates by category (APM, infrastructure, logs), and trend direction indicators

Reconcile allocated licenses against actual usage metrics, identify over-provisioned and under-utilized segments, classify variance patterns (steady-state, growth, decline), and generate actionable optimization recommendations

plan.cost_rationale: Three subtasks are required: (1) Extract allocation and current usage data from SQL warehouse (mid-tier for multi-table joins on licensing and usage tables); (2) Calculate historical growth metrics and trends (mid-tier for time-series aggregations with window functions); (3) Reconcile the two datasets to classify utilization patterns and generate recommendations (frontier-tier for multi-signal analysis, variance classification, and strategic recommendations). This is minimal decomposition—each subtask represents a distinct logical step (data acquisition, trend calculation, reconciliation+analysis) and cannot be meaningfully combined without losing clarity.

output.sql: SELECT cf.license_id, cf.publisher, cf.product, cf.event_date, cf.event_type, cf.amount_usd, cf.daily_active_seats, cf.user_id, cf.fiscal_year, cf.fiscal_quarter, COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY cf.license_id, cf.fiscal_year, cf.fiscal_quarter) AS events_per_license_per_quarter, SUM(cf.amount_usd) OVER (PARTITION BY cf.license_id, cf.fiscal_year, cf.fiscal_quarter) AS total_spend_per_license_per_quarter, AVG(cf.daily_active_seats) OVER (PARTITION BY cf.license_id, cf.fiscal_year, cf.fiscal_quarter) AS avg_active_seats_per_quarter, MAX(cf.daily_active_seats) OVER (PARTITION BY cf.license_id, cf.fiscal_year) AS max_active_seats_per_year, SUM(cf.amount_usd) OVER (PARTITION BY cf.license_id, cf.fiscal_year) AS total_spend_per_license_per_year, LAG(cf.daily_active_seats) OVER (PARTITION BY cf.license_id ORDER BY cf.event_date) AS prev_day_active_seats, cf.daily_active_seats - LAG(cf.daily_active_seats) OVER (PARTITION BY cf.license_id ORDER BY cf.event_date) AS seat_growth_day_over_day, SUM(cf.amount_usd) OVER (PARTITION BY cf.license_id ORDER BY cf.event_date ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS cumulative_spend_per_license FROM consumption_facts cf WHERE cf.publisher ILIKE '%datadog%' ORDER BY cf.license_id, cf.event_date

output.raw_output:
{"sql": "SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('month', event_date) AS month,
  product,
  SUM(amount_usd) AS total_amount_usd,
  SUM(daily_active_seats) AS total_active_seats,
  COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS distinct_users,
  COUNT(event_id) AS event_count,
  LAG(SUM(amount_usd)) OVER (PARTITION BY product ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('month', event_date)) AS prev_month_amount,
  LAG(SUM(daily_active_seats)) OVER (PARTITION BY product ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('month', event_date)) AS prev_month_seats,
  LAG(SUM(amount_usd), 12) OVER (PARTITION BY product ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('month', event_date)) AS prev_year_amount,
  LAG(SUM(daily_active_seats), 12) OVER (PARTITION BY product ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('month', event_date)) AS prev_year_seats,
  ROUND(
    CASE
      WHEN LAG(SUM(amount_usd)) OVER (PARTITION BY product ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('month', event_date)) IS NULL
        OR LAG(SUM(amount_usd)) OVER (PARTITION BY product ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('month', event_date)) = 0 THEN NULL
      ELSE (
        (SUM(amount_usd) - LAG(SUM(amount_usd)) OVER (PARTITION BY product ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('month', event_date)))
        / LAG(SUM(amount_usd)) OVER (PARTITION BY product ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('month', event_date))
      ) * 100
    END, 2
  ) AS mom_amount_growth_pct,
  ROUND(
    CASE
      WHEN LAG(SUM(daily_active_seats)) OVER (PARTITION BY product ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('month', event_date)) IS NULL
        OR LAG(SUM(daily_active_seats)) OVER (PARTITION BY product ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('month', event_date)) = 0 THEN NULL
      ELSE (
        (SUM(daily_active_seats) - LAG(SUM(daily_active_seats)) OVER (PARTITION BY product ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('month', event_date)))
        / LAG(SUM(daily_active_seats)) OVER (PARTITION BY product ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('month', event_date))::NUMERIC
      ) * 100
    END, 2
  ) AS mom_seats_growth_pct,
  ROUND(
    CASE
      WHEN LAG(SUM(amount_usd), 12) OVER (PARTITION BY product ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('month', event_date)) IS NULL
        OR LAG(SUM(amount_usd), 12) OVER (PARTITION BY product ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('month', event_date)) = 0 THEN NULL
      ELSE (
